title: Explorers SMP Datapack
description: Datapack for minecraft that implements naturally generating structures containing early-game items, OP loot and a bit of lore to minecraft.
body:
Structures is an datapack that intends to further integrate the mod into vanilla by adding naturally generating structures.


```
Makers notes;
These structures are built in the vanilla building style.
```

Currently, there are unique structures added to the following biomes:

- Plains (all)
- Taiga (all except snowy)
- Badlands
- Snowy (all)
- Cherry grove
- Mushroom islands

Please report issues on the [issue tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/Blockhaven-Studios/ExploSMP/issues).
